summary: Tested sidebar menu permissions and backend API access for student, teacher, and admin roles. All backend tests pass (10/10). Frontend login and sidebar filtering work correctly - students don't see admin/schedule items, teachers don't see admin/user management items.
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: get_current_user in server.py (line 352) and routes/deps.py (line 106) now correctly load permissions from roles collection
FIX VERIFIED: Login endpoint in routes/auth.py loads permissions from roles collection consistently
FIX VERIFIED: SideMenu.tsx correctly filters items based on user permissions - removed forAll:true from schedule, tightened permissions on admin/dept-dashboard items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar permission filtering bug is FIXED. Backend get_current_user functions in server.py and routes/deps.py now correctly load permissions from roles collection. SideMenu.tsx correctly filters menu items based on user permissions. Students only see Home and Student Report, Teachers see Home, Schedule, and Reports section but NOT admin items.

backend_api_tests.student_permissions_from_login: PASS - Student has correct permissions: view_attendance, view_lectures, report_student
backend_api_tests.student_auth_me: PASS - GET /api/auth/me returns correct student permissions
backend_api_tests.student_report_api: PASS - Student can access student report API
backend_api_tests.teacher_permissions_from_login: PASS - Teacher has correct permissions: record_attendance, view_attendance, view_reports, etc.
backend_api_tests.teacher_auth_me: PASS - GET /api/auth/me returns correct teacher permissions
backend_api_tests.teacher_report_apis: PASS - Teacher can access all report APIs (student, attendance-overview, daily, absent-students)
backend_api_tests.admin_all_apis: PASS - Admin can access all APIs

frontend_tests.student_login_ui: PASS - Student can login via UI
frontend_tests.student_sidebar_filtering: PASS - Student doesn't see Schedule, Admin Panel, Manage Students, Dept Dashboard
frontend_tests.teacher_login_ui: PASS - Teacher can login via UI
frontend_tests.teacher_sidebar_filtering: PASS - Teacher doesn't see Admin Panel, Manage Users, Dept Dashboard
